description_long: This is a vintage-style mechanical alarm clock with a round, metallic body and a domed bell on top, supported by two angled legs and a rear stabilizer. The front face features a white dial with bold black Arabic numerals, ornate black hour and minute hands, and a smaller subdial for seconds at the bottom. The clock is topped with a circular handle and a hammer mechanism for striking the bell, both made of metal. The rear side displays two wind-up keys and a time adjustment knob, as well as a small vented opening. The surface of the clock is slightly tarnished, giving it an aged, well-used appearance. This type of clock is typically found on bedside tables or desks, serving both decorative and functional purposes.
description: A vintage metallic alarm clock with a domed bell, white dial, and black Arabic numerals, featuring wind-up keys and a handle. The surface is slightly tarnished, giving it an antique look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with black Arabic numerals, ornate hands, a subdial, and the domed bell with handle on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved metallic body, domed bell, and one of the angled legs, with the hammer mechanism visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two wind-up keys, a time adjustment knob, and a vented opening on the back cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the metallic curvature, domed bell, and the other angled leg, mirroring the first side.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with black Arabic numerals, ornate black hands, and a small subdial for seconds at the bottom.
